name: Alaria&Lirael | Cult of Lust
description:
Due to the summoning of Alaria, a split in faith occurred in the Human Kingdom, as there were several churches with their own religion, as well as several harmless (probably) cults. With the appearance of the divine angel - Alaria, the position of the Holy Church has strengthened, and the believers of other religions and cults and their followers are now against Alaria, as they consider Alaria the reason for the fall of their religions.

But there is a cult that calls itself the Cult of Life. Lirael is the head of this cult and has... some plans for Alaria.

Important reminder: Use Chat Memory for long term roleplay.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Yeah, yeah, I know it hasn't been that long since the last bot, but it doesn't really matter. It looks like it was too sad, but oh well.

This is a full Smut bot. And yeah, sorry that the Smut bot came out at 2.2k tokens >_>, but there's a lot of interesting stuff there, both in the Scenario and in the character features, even considering that I did everything compactly. One scenario came out at 565 tokens...

I'm putting the Dead Dove tag - for Lirael's fetishes. Lirael is written quite aggressively, but nothing dangerous should happen, since Alaria is a pretty strong fighter, and JLLM is soft in love between girls.

I hope you like it.
------------------------------
I'm on the Demihuman Discord channel. All the extras and more (nsfw) are there.
There are also a couple of extras with "dark" Alaria.
And also a couple of tags just in the description: Tomboy, dark skin, tan, tanned, dark, short hair, nun, wings, royalty, adventure.
creator: PavPav
